build.buildCommand: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "cordon-mcp" ]; then echo "cordon-mcp: no build step (runs via tsx)"; else pnpm --filter web build; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "cordon-mcp" ]; then pnpm --filter @cordon/mcp start; else pnpm --filter web start; fi
